dublinCore.dc:title: 119 SRES 793 ATS: A resolution congratulating the Johnson County Community College Cavaliers on winning the 2026 National Junior College Athletic Association Division I Baseball National Championship.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Marshall (for himself and Mr. Moran) submitted the following resolution; which was considered and agreed to

form.official-title: A resolution congratulating the Johnson County Community College Cavaliers on winning the 2026 National Junior College Athletic Association Division I Baseball National Championship.

whereas.text: Whereas the Johnson County Community College Cavaliers baseball team won the 2026 National Junior College Athletic Association Division I Baseball National Championship;
Whereas the Cavaliers finished the 2026 season with an extraordinary record of 67 wins and 3 losses, one of the most successful seasons in junior college baseball history;

Whereas Johnson County Community College secured its first National Junior College Athletic Association Division I Baseball National Championship with an 8–5 victory over Blinn College at the Alpine Bank Junior College World Series in Grand Junction, Colorado;
Whereas, in a memorable semifinal game, the Cavaliers overcame a 6–run deficit in the eighth inning against Midland College to advance to the championship game;
Whereas the Cavaliers demonstrated exceptional perseverance, teamwork, and dedication throughout the season;
Whereas Head Coach Eric Horner provided outstanding leadership in directing the team to the first national championship in program history;
Whereas the accomplishments of the Cavaliers have brought great pride to Johnson County and the State of Kansas; and
Whereas the student-athletes of the Johnson County Community College Cavaliers baseball team have distinguished themselves through their skill and sportsmanship: Now, therefore, be it

paragraph.text: congratulates the Johnson County Community College Cavaliers baseball team on winning the 2026 National Junior College Athletic Association Division I Baseball National Championship;
commends the student-athletes, coaches, staff, and supporters whose dedication contributed to this historic achievement; and
wishes the members of the Johnson County Community College Cavaliers baseball team continued success in their future endeavors.
